name_en: Midnight Black OHANEL🚩🚩 Oversized logo suede double pocket chain bag! This brown double pocket bag is really special🤩, the black overall body has a great vibe, and it looks very cool when worn! Definitely the king of trendy bright colors. The calfskin material feels super soft and smooth, ready to grab and go, super nice. Chanel Chance really delivers! You can take it away~! I love its simple, casual, and free-spirited style. This color double pocket bag is really beautiful! The material feels like a combination of suede and leather, not as soft as pure suede, but not as hard either, just right. This color is also very good for matching with clothes😍😍 Dimensions: 34x25x10cm
